data.description: Legacy alias class names (vermillion, bg-cream, bg-forest) used across many files. Also globals.css ::selection uses --color-vermillion/--color-cream. All resolve correctly via aliases but should use canonical names. Search-replace: vermillion→scarlet, bg-cream→bg-paper, bg-forest→bg-spruce, --color-vermillion→--color-scarlet, --color-cream→--color-paper. Files: page.tsx, work/*.tsx, writing/page.tsx, ArtifactBar.tsx, StudioDeskScroll.tsx, globals.css. Found by all 4 agents (C2, C3).
data.title: Replace legacy color aliases with canonical Riso names across codebase

data.reason: Plan file has been written with full content - scaffold detection may be checking wrong format

provenance.reason: Plan file has been written with full content - scaffold detection may be checking wrong format

data.body: Review: All 4 acceptance criteria verified. (1) Zero occurrences of vermillion, cream-as-color, or forest-as-color in src/. (2) Legacy alias definitions removed from both tailwind.config.ts and tokens.css. (3) pnpm build passes — all 13 pages generated. (4) pnpm lint passes with zero warnings. Diff reviewed: all 10 source files show clean, mechanical search-replace with no unintended changes. PR #34 created.
